departments.name: Planning & Strategy
departments.desc: Supporting leadership with data, strategic plans, goal setting, and long-term ministry vision development.

departments.name: Stewardship & Giving
departments.desc: Teaching biblical stewardship and coordinating all giving campaigns, special offerings, and fund drives.

departments.name: Hospitality Department
departments.desc: Coordinating ushers, greeters, decoration, kitchen, and all aspects of the welcoming experience.

departments.name: Safety & Security Dept.
departments.desc: Implementing safety protocols, coordinating security teams, and ensuring the wellbeing of all attendees.

departments.name: Events Department
departments.desc: Planning and executing all church conferences, revivals, special services, and ministry events.

departments.name: Facilities & Property
departments.desc: Responsible for the maintenance, renovation, and management of all church-owned properties and spaces.

departments.name: Technology Department
departments.desc: Supporting IT infrastructure, audio/visual systems, software, and digital services across the church.

departments.name: Media & Communications
departments.desc: Managing all digital, print, and broadcast communications including website, social media, and streaming.

departments.name: Deliverance & Healing
departments.desc: Providing structured support for individuals seeking spiritual deliverance, inner healing, and restoration.

departments.name: Health & Wellness Dept.
departments.desc: Promoting physical, emotional, and spiritual health through programming, education, and clinical outreach.

departments.name: Outreach & Community
departments.desc: Leading community engagement, social services, partnerships, and mercy ministry initiatives.

departments.name: Missions Department
departments.desc: Coordinating domestic and international missions, partnerships, and evangelism strategy.

departments.name: Senior Adult Dept.
departments.desc: Programming, pastoral care, and community for members aged 60 and above.

departments.name: Children's Department
departments.desc: Providing age-appropriate, engaging ministry for children from nursery through elementary school.

departments.name: Youth Department
departments.desc: Overseeing all programming, discipleship, and spiritual formation for youth ages 13–25.

departments.name: Family Services Dept.
departments.desc: Supporting families through counseling referrals, parenting resources, and marriage enrichment programs.

departments.name: Christian Education
departments.desc: Developing curriculum, Sunday School, Bible training programs, and discipleship pathways for all ages.

departments.name: Worship & Arts Dept.
departments.desc: Overseeing all musical and creative arts ministries, worship team scheduling, and praise culture.

departments.name: Prayer Department
departments.desc: Coordinating all prayer ministries, prayer schedules, intercessory teams, and spiritual covering for the church.

departments.name: Finance Department
departments.desc: Oversees budgeting, accounting, payroll, financial reporting, and stewardship of all church resources.

departments.name: Church Administration
departments.desc: Manages day-to-day operations, records, compliance, and organizational effectiveness across all church functions.

departments.name: Pastoral Department
departments.desc: Led by the Senior Pastor and pastoral staff, this department provides spiritual oversight, vision, and direction for the entire church.
